request.prompt: a members table where each row has a remove button

children.text: <alert-dialog> <alert-dialog-trigger> <button props={"variant":"destructive"} text="Remove"/> </alert-dialog-trigger> <alert-dialog-content> <alert-dialog-title text="Remove Alice Smith?"/> <alert-dialog-description text="This will permanently remove Alice Smith from your account."/> <alert-dialog-footer> <alert-dialog-cancel text="Cancel"/> <alert-dialog-action props={"variant":"destructive"} text="Delete"/> </alert-dialog-footer> </alert-dialog-content> </alert-dialog>

<alert-dialog> <alert-dialog-trigger> <button props={"variant":"destructive"} text="Remove"/> </alert-dialog-trigger> <alert-dialog-content> <alert-dialog-title text="Remove Bob Johnson?"/> <alert-dialog-description text="This will permanently remove Bob Johnson from your account."/> <alert-dialog-footer> <alert-dialog-cancel text="Cancel"/> <alert-dialog-action props={"variant":"destructive"} text="Delete"/> </alert-dialog-footer> </alert-dialog-content> </alert-dialog>

findings.message: Required component 'alert-dialog' does not appear in the surface.
findings.rationale: Dialog can be dismissed by clicking the overlay or pressing Escape, so a user can bypass a destructive confirmation without making a conscious choice. AlertDialog forces an explicit confirm/cancel decision and is announced with greater urgency by screen readers.

Violation 1: [rule.destructive-requires-alertdialog / must]
  At: $.root (component: surface)
  Required component 'alert-dialog' does not appear in the surface.
  Why: Dialog can be dismissed by clicking the overlay or pressing Escape, so a user can bypass a destructive confirmation without making a conscious choice. AlertDialog forces an explicit confirm/cancel decision and is announced with greater urgency by screen readers.
